title: Knicks Tracker
lede: Deterministic output of upcoming fixtures and Jalen Brunson's recent scoring trends.

highlights.label: Threshold Flag
highlights.detail: L3 average is greater than or equal to 30

sections.title: Upcoming Schedule
sections.description: Next 5 deterministic fixtures for the team.

sections.title: Recent Scoring Logs
sections.description: Jalen Brunson's point totals over the last 5 starts.

demoSteps: Initialise the web view to simulate the command execution.
Review the upcoming schedule table for the next 5 deterministic fixtures.
Verify the L5 (31.2) and L3 (33.7) scoring averages match the underlying data.
Observe the threshold flag activating due to the L3 average exceeding 30 points.
notes: All data is hardcoded via local fixtures to ensure zero network variance.
UK spelling applied to all user-facing copy.
Decoupled data architecture is in place to allow API swap in V2.
